task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'administrator' in the user profile area).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to create a new Change Request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Change' form or dialog is open within the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is filled out correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field contains exactly 'Upgrade email server from Exchange 2016 to Exchange 2019'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Change Type is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Change Type dropdown or field is set to 'Normal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Reason field is filled out correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Reason for Change field contains 'Microsoft Exchange 2016 end of support is approaching. Upgrade required to maintain security patches and vendor support.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Impact is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Impact dropdown or field is set to 'Medium'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Change Request was successfully saved or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, toast notification, or the details view of the newly created Change Request showing it has been saved in the system with the specified details.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus interface, not a text editor, notes app, or mock UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GUI to create the change request rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, Python scripts, or direct database insertions should be used to complete the task.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually submitted the form and didn't just type the text without saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots must show evidence of the record being saved (e.g., a read-only view of the created ticket or a success confirmation), rather than just an unsaved draft form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Change Request details are: Title: 'Upgrade email server from Exchange 2016 to Exchange 2019', Change Type: 'Normal', Reason: 'Microsoft Exchange 2016 end of support is approaching. Upgrade required to maintain security patches and vendor support.', and Impact: 'Medium'.
